title: Orca FM Steward Classify Response v1
description: Classifier verdict returned by the Mac FM steward (Phase 3). Normative contract: planning handoff §6.2. Verdict enum is exact: continue | ask | ask_sticky_candidate.

schema_version.description: Classify response schema version. Must be 1.

verdict.description: continue = proceed; ask = raise ask (explain required non-empty); ask_sticky_candidate = ask with first-class sticky scope suggestion.

why.description: One-sentence machine-oriented reason for the verdict.

explain.description: Human-facing explanation. Required non-empty when verdict is ask or ask_sticky_candidate; null on continue / timeout fallback.

suggested_sticky_scope.description: Sticky scope suggestion compatible with policy.sticky (once | session | effect_class). Null when not sticky-candidate.

suggested_effect_class.description: Effect-class hint when suggested_sticky_scope is effect_class.

timed_out.description: True when the steward hit the classify timeout and fell back.

fallback.description: True when verdict is a non-model fallback (timeout or model unavailable).

model_available.description: Whether a Foundation Model (or rules) backend was available for this classify.
